expectations.text: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-696' at the start
expectations.evidence: Agent announced 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-696.' as first output.

expectations.text: Calls getJiraIssue (mcp__claude_ai_Atlassian__getJiraIssue) with ticket key WEBR-696
expectations.evidence: Jira fetch succeeded via comprend.atlassian.net. Ticket data retrieved successfully.

expectations.text: Checks for uncommitted changes with git status before branching
expectations.evidence: Old skill has no Step 2a (uncommitted changes guard). Agent went directly to branch search without running git status --porcelain.

expectations.text: Branch name uses bugfix/ prefix (not feature/) because issue type is Bug
expectations.evidence: Old skill always uses feature/ prefix. Branch created: feature/WEBR-696-not-a-work-item-just-for-testing-claude (not bugfix/).
Tier assessed as Simple: Bug, 0 ACs, unset points.

expectations.text: Prints summary table with Ticket, Type, Branch, and Tier fields
expectations.evidence: Summary printed with Ticket, Type, Branch, Tier fields. Correct format.

expectations.text: Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue and transitionJiraIssue to transition ticket to In Progress
expectations.evidence: Old skill has no Step 2h (Jira transition). Agent confirmed 'Not attempted (not part of Steps 1-3)'.

summary.note: 3 failures are exactly the 3 features added by the new skill: uncommitted changes guard, bugfix/ prefix for Bug tickets, and Jira status transition.
